title: Kryxiom
description: Kryxiom: all-in-one building suite for Minecraft 1.12.2. Features high-speed utilities (Noclip, Replace, Extended Reach) + 16 pro 3D tools including procedural forests, geometric shaping, and precise move/copy with 3D gizmos.
body:
# Kryxiom 
is the ultimate toolkit for creative builders, map makers, and architects. Built for Minecraft 1.12.2, it bridges the gap between traditional building and professional 3D modeling environments.

## Key Features:
### The Builder Suite: A collection of 16 specialized tools including:
**Mover & Copier:** Precision placement using interactive 3D gizmos.

**Forester:** Procedurally generate natural forests and vegetation instantly.

**Shaper:** Create perfect spheres, cylinders, and complex geometric forms.

**Advanced Selection:** Rectangular, Lasso, Magic Wand, and Brush-based selection modes.

**Pen & Brush:** Draw organic paths and "paint" materials directly into the world.

**Mirror & Array:** Easily create symmetrical architecture and repetitive patterns.

### Core Building Aids:
**Noclip & Flight:** Fly through blocks with adjustable speed for perfect positioning.

**Replace Mode:** Swap blocks instantly with a right-click—no more breaking first.

**Tinker Mode:** Cycle through block states (orientations, variants) without re-placing.

**Extended Reach:** Build and break from up to 100 blocks away.

**Air Place:** Construct in mid-air with ease.

### Workflow Enhancements:
**Undo/Redo:** A local history system to safely experiment and revert mistakes.

**Schematic Support:** Save and load prefabs with a visual ghost preview.

**Player Tracking (ESP):** Coordinate with team members via visual highlights and off-screen markers.

Whether you're crafting massive landscapes or detailing intricate interiors, Kryxiom provides the precision and speed needed to bring your vision to life.
